inputs.label: Batch Size (g)
inputs.businessContext: Production batch size in grams, typical lab scale is 1000g.

inputs.label: Unit Weight (g)
inputs.businessContext: Weight per finished product unit (e.g., a foundation is 30g, a lipstick 4g).

inputs.label: Material Cost per Gram
inputs.businessContext: Average bulk raw material cost per gram including all ingredients.

inputs.label: Container Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Packaging and container cost per finished product unit.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Unit
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor cost allocated per finished product unit.

inputs.label: Overhead (%)
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as a percentage of total direct cost.

inputs.label: Desired Margin (%)
inputs.businessContext: Profit margin markup on total cost per unit to determine selling price.
